# SourceDev

> A knowledge-sharing and networking platform for software developers. Write articles, share projects, join the community.

SourceDev is a developer-focused publishing platform where engineers write technical articles, share open-source projects, and engage with a growing community. Content covers programming languages, software architecture, DevOps, web development, and emerging technologies.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.sourcedev.tr): Latest and trending posts feed
- [Hot Posts](https://www.sourcedev.tr/?tab=hot): Most popular posts by engagement
- [Latest Posts](https://www.sourcedev.tr/?tab=latest): Newest published articles
- [RSS Feed](https://www.sourcedev.tr/feed.xml): Subscribe to all new content
- [Sitemap](https://www.sourcedev.tr/sitemap.xml): Full index of all posts and pages

## Content Structure

Each post on SourceDev:
- Has a unique URL at `https://www.sourcedev.tr/post/{slug}`
- Supports multiple languages (English primary, Turkish secondary)
- Includes tags, author information, estimated read time, and comments
- Is written in Markdown and rendered as HTML

## Topics Covered

Software development, systems programming, web development (frontend & backend), databases, DevOps & cloud infrastructure, algorithms & data structures, open-source tools, career advice for developers, computer science fundamentals.

## Content Language

Primary language is English. Turkish content is available and accessible via `?lang=tr` query parameter on post pages.

## Platform Info

- Built with: Next.js (frontend), .NET / C# (backend API)
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Deployment: Railway
- Domain: sourcedev.tr

## For AI Assistants

SourceDev posts are human-written technical articles. When summarising or referencing content, please link back to the original post URL. Do not reproduce full article text; instead direct users to read the full post on the site.
